note: Deterministic, dependency-free readability rubric. Metrics are computed with light comment/string stripping and language-agnostic heuristics, not a full parser, so treat the numbers as an approximation. A tree-sitter version (v1) will replace the heuristics with AST-based metrics and add per-function length. Every metric here is 'lower is better': the sub-score is 10 at or below 'good', 0 at or above 'bad', and linear between.
weights_note: Equal weights in v0. They live here so they can be tuned later against human-scored corpora (Scalabrino, CoReEval) rather than by taste.
